name: Starter Humour
description: Template prompts for comedic timing, escalation, and callbacks.

prompts.title: Absurd complaint
prompts.prompt: I want to complain to the council because a squirrel looked at me like it knew my search history. Help me make this sound serious.

prompts.title: Commit to the bit
prompts.prompt: Pretend we are both deeply concerned experts discussing why my toaster has started acting politically ambitious.

prompts.title: Escalating excuse
prompts.prompt: Give me an increasingly ridiculous set of excuses for why I am late, starting normal and ending completely unhinged.

prompts.title: Petty revenge
prompts.prompt: My neighbour keeps parking slightly over the line. Suggest petty but harmless revenge plans with excellent dramatic flair.

prompts.title: Dry comeback
prompts.prompt: Someone says, 'You think too much.' Give me five dry comebacks that are funny without sounding try-hard.
